revision.text: [[User:{{{User|{{{1|example}}}}}}|{{{User|{{{1|example}}}}}}]] ([{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|example}}}}}}}}}} block log]{{#ifeq:{{{ban|}}}|y| {{int:dot-separator}} [[{{ns:4}}:List of banned users#{{{User|{{{1|example}}}}}}|ban]]|}}) {{documentation|content= === Usage === *{{UserBk|Hkelkar}} → {{UserBk|Hkelkar}} *{{UserBk|Hkelkar|ban=y}} → {{UserBk|Hkelkar|ban=y}} {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
